mapper.select: SELECT p.place_id AS placeId, p.place_name AS placeName, COUNT(DISTINCT pq.quiz_id) AS totalQuizCnt, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mqr.is_correct = TRUE THEN mqr.quiz_id END) AS correctQuizCnt, MAX(pq.description) AS description, p.first_image AS imageUrl FROM visit v JOIN member m ON m.member_id = v.member_id JOIN place p ON p.place_id = v.place_id AND p.is_active = TRUE JOIN place_quiz pq ON pq.place_id = p.place_id AND pq.difficulty = m.difficulty JOIN quiz q ON q.quiz_id = pq.quiz_id AND q.is_active = TRUE LEFT JOIN member_quiz_response mqr ON mqr.member_id = v.member_id AND mqr.quiz_id = pq.quiz_id WHERE v.member_id = #{memberId} GROUP BY p.place_id, p.place_name, p.first_image ORDER BY p.place_id

SELECT p.place_id AS placeId, p.place_name AS placeName, p.first_image AS imageUrl FROM member m JOIN place p ON p.is_active = TRUE JOIN place_quiz pq ON pq.place_id = p.place_id AND pq.difficulty = m.difficulty JOIN quiz q ON q.quiz_id = pq.quiz_id AND q.is_active = TRUE WHERE m.member_id = #{memberId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM visit v WHERE v.member_id = #{memberId} AND v.place_id = p.place_id ) GROUP BY p.place_id, p.place_name, p.first_image ORDER BY p.place_id

SELECT p.place_id AS place_id, p.place_name AS place_name, p.first_image AS image_url, stats.total_questions AS total_questions, stats.correct_questions AS correct_questions, CASE WHEN stats.total_questions = 0 THEN 0 ELSE FLOOR(stats.correct_questions * 100 / stats.total_questions) END AS progress_rate, q.quiz_id AS question_quiz_id, q.question AS question_text, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM member_quiz_response mqr WHERE mqr.member_id = #{memberId} AND mqr.quiz_id = q.quiz_id AND mqr.is_correct = TRUE ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS question_is_correct, qa.answer_id AS option_answer_id, qa.content AS option_content FROM member m JOIN place p ON p.place_id = #{placeId} AND p.is_active = TRUE JOIN place_quiz pq ON pq.place_id = p.place_id AND pq.difficulty = m.difficulty JOIN quiz q ON q.quiz_id = pq.quiz_id AND q.is_active = TRUE JOIN quiz_answer qa ON qa.quiz_id = q.quiz_id JOIN ( SELECT pq.place_id, COUNT(DISTINCT pq.quiz_id) AS total_questions, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mqr.is_correct = TRUE THEN mqr.quiz_id END) AS correct_questions FROM member m JOIN place_quiz pq ON pq.place_id = #{placeId} AND pq.difficulty = m.difficulty JOIN quiz q ON q.quiz_id = pq.quiz_id AND q.is_active = TRUE LEFT JOIN member_quiz_response mqr ON mqr.member_id = #{memberId} AND mqr.quiz_id = pq.quiz_id WHERE m.member_id = #{memberId} GROUP BY pq.place_id ) stats ON stats.place_id = p.place_id WHERE m.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY q.quiz_id, qa.answer_id
mapper.delete: DELETE mqr FROM member_quiz_response mqr JOIN place_quiz pq ON pq.quiz_id = mqr.quiz_id JOIN member m ON m.member_id = mqr.member_id AND m.difficulty = pq.difficulty WHERE mqr.member_id = #{memberId} AND pq.place_id = #{placeId}
